_sizing_note: max_trade_pct = how much equity to deploy per signal; max_position_pct = max total allocation per symbol
_rr_note: stop must be LESS than take_profit for a positive risk/reward ratio. 3% stop / 6% take = 1:2 R/R
_circuit_note: Bot closes all positions and halts if daily P&L hits either limit
_signal_note: signal_threshold = min confirmations required out of 4 indicators (SMA, RSI, MACD, VWAP)
